reason: Baseline backend verification checklist for final review of deployment and integration changes.
Check agent should validate regression coverage, contract clarity, secret safety, and boundary placement for the deployment refactor.
Review must ensure startup, SSH, worker, and integration failures are logged safely without leaking tokens or local key paths.
Check agent should confirm new deployment code lives in the right modules and does not smear orchestration across the wrong layers.
One success criterion is reducing duplicate setup logic across scripts and skills, so review should inspect reuse decisions explicitly.
Quality review should verify the deployment core, execution plane, notifier/runtime integrations, and tests stay coherent across layers.
